contract_claim: Document says the AdapterFactory section's file is 'packages/shared/src/factories/adapter-factory.ts (base class), packages/shared/src/interfaces/adapter-registry.ts (interface)'. The shadow docs confirm the base class in adapter-registry.ts is actually called 'BaseAdapterFactory', not 'AdapterFactory'. The document conflates AdapterFactory (from factories/adapter-factory.ts) with BaseAdapterFactory (from interfaces/adapter-registry.ts). The JavascriptAdapterFactory extends BaseAdapterFactory, not AdapterFactory.
observed_behavior: `BaseAdapterFactory` (L190–207) Optional base for concrete factories implementing `IAdapterFactory`. Constructor accepts `AdapterMetadata`.
